title: Human Resources Intern
description:
Job Title: HR INTERN

About Us

“Capco, a Wipro company, is a global technology and management consulting firm. Awarded with Consultancy of the year in the British Bank Award and has been ranked Top 100 Best Companies for Women in India 2022 by Avtar & Seramount. With our presence across 32 cities across globe, we support 100+ clients across banking, financial and Energy sectors. We are recognized for our deep transformation execution and delivery.

WHY JOIN CAPCO?

You will work on engaging projects with the largest international and local banks, insurance companies, payment service providers and other key players in the industry. The projects that will transform the financial services industry.

MAKE AN IMPACT

Innovative thinking, delivery excellence and thought leadership to help our clients transform their business. Together with our clients and industry partners, we deliver disruptive work that is changing energy and financial services.

#BEYOURSELFATWORK

Capco has a tolerant, open culture that values diversity, inclusivity, and creativity.

CAREER ADVANCEMENT

With no forced hierarchy at Capco, everyone has the opportunity to grow as we grow, taking their career into their own hands.

DIVERSITY & INCLUSION

We believe that diversity of people and perspective gives us a competitive advantage.




We’re Hiring: HR Intern (Full-Time | Contract to Hire)

Are you a recent MBA (HR) graduate looking to kick-start your HR career with hands-on exposure to HR operations, documentation, and process excellence in a global environment? This opportunity is for you!

🔍 Role Overview

We are hiring one HR Intern to support our HR team in clean-up and validation of Employee Personnel Files (P-Files) across APAC regions ahead of an SAP migration, and to assist in revising, updating, and publishing HR Process SOPs.

This role is ideal for a detail-oriented fresher who enjoys working with documents, process improvements, and structured data.

📍 Location & Work Model

Location: EC, Bengaluru
Work Model: Hybrid – Office on Tuesday & Wednesday
Shift: 7:00 AM – 4:00 PM IST
Weekly Off: Saturday & Sunday

⏳ Contract Details

Type: Intern (Full-Time)
Duration: 3 Months (Contract-to-Hire opportunity)
Notice Period: Immediate

✅ Key Responsibilities

Clean, organize, and validate Employee Personnel Files (P-Files) for APAC employees
Ensure documents meet compliance and audit standards
Assist in reviewing, updating, and formatting HR Process SOPs
Support SOP version control and publishing
Coordinate with the Hiring Manager/Coach for documentation accuracy
Maintain strict confidentiality of employee data

🎓 Eligibility & Skills

MBA / PGDM in HR (Fresher preferred | 0–6 months experience)
Strong MS Office skills (Excel, Word, PowerPoint)
Excellent written and verbal communication
High attention to detail and process orientation
Willingness to work on documentation-heavy tasks




If you are keen to join us, you will be part of an organization that values your contributions, recognizes your potential, and provides ample opportunities for growth. For more information, visit www.capco.com. Follow us on Twitter, Facebook, LinkedIn, and YouTube.

Show more

title: MBA fresher / MBA graduate [ONLY FRESHER]
description:
JOB DESCRIPTION: MBA graduate ONLY FRESHER




We are looking for highly motivated and talented MBA graduates (final year students or recent graduates) who demonstrate strong analytical thinking, communication skills, and a passion for solving business challenges.




This role is designed for individuals who are eager to learn, adaptable, and capable of working in a dynamic professional environment. The selected candidates will gain exposure to core business functions, collaborate with cross-functional teams, and contribute to strategic initiatives that drive organizational growth.




Key qualities:

Support business teams in research, analysis, and execution of strategic initiatives
Analyze data, prepare reports, and present insights to stakeholders
Assist in planning, coordination, and implementation of projects
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to improve processes and efficiency
Participate in problem-solving and decision-making activities
Conduct market and competitor research to support business strategies




Eligibility criteria:

MBA (or equivalent postgraduate management degree) – final year students or recent graduates
Strong academic record with consistent performance
Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities
Ability to adapt quickly in a fast-paced environment
Positive attitude, curiosity, and eagerness to learn
Proficiency in MS Office (Excel, PowerPoint, Word)

title: Sales Associate & Intern
description:
Location: Bengaluru (Indiranagar)

Reporting to: Sales Manager

Full Time: Fresher to 2 years

Internship: at least 3 months mandatory




About Lane

At Lane, we’re reimagining how India learns driving and experiences car ownership. From structured driving programs to car buying & selling within our trusted community, we’re building a tech-enabled mobility ecosystem for first-time drivers. With 15,000+ registrations and strong early traction, we’re scaling fast — and sales sits at the heart of our growth journey.




Role Overview

As a Sales Associate & Intern, you will drive revenue by converting high-intent leads into paying customers. You’ll work closely with marketing, operations, and customer success teams to ensure a seamless experience from first interaction to onboarding. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys speaking with customers, understands consultative selling, and wants to grow in a fast-paced startup environment.




Key Responsibilities

Convert inbound leads into customers via calls and WhatsApp
Understand customer requirements and recommend the right driving package
Manage follow-ups and maintain strong pipeline hygiene
Track daily conversions and revenue targets
Coordinate with operations for smooth onboarding
Maintain CRM data accuracy
Identify customer objections and improve pitch quality
Upsell relevant services (RTO assistance, car buying support, etc.)




What We’re Looking For

Fresher to 2 years of experience in inside sales / telesales / EdTech / mobility / service sales
Strong communication skills (English + Hindi preferred; Kannada is a bonus)
High ownership mindset
Comfortable working with targets and performance metrics
Basic understanding of Google Sheets / CRM tools
Ability to handle objections confidently
Startup attitude — adaptable, fast learner, action-oriented




What You’ll Gain

Direct exposure to startup growth and revenue strategy
Clear performance metrics & learning curve
Opportunity to grow into senior sales / city lead roles
High ownership from Day 1
Work closely with founders




Why Join Lane?

Because we’re not just selling driving lessons — we’re building confidence, independence, and a trusted car ownership ecosystem for India’s next generation of drivers. If you’re excited about mobility, growth, and building something meaningful — we’d love to meet you.

Show more

title: Sales and Operations Intern
description:
Sales & Operations Intern (Paid Internship)




📍 Bangalore | ⏱ Duration: 6 months | Stipend: INR 20,000/month

Must have a two-wheeler and valid driving license




Are you a fresher looking to kickstart your career in sales?

Do you love meeting new people, presenting ideas, and solving problems?

Join Kyrobar, a fast-growing IoT startup transforming inventory management for premium hotels and pubs.




Kyrobar is revolutionizing inventory management for bars, restaurants, and hotels with our smart IoT solution. Trusted by brands like Toit, Ironhill, Taj, and Marriott,..etc we’re expanding rapidly and looking for a Sales & Operations Intern who thrives in the field, loves talking to clients, and wants to be part of a fast-growing startup.




What You’ll Do:

Sales

Identify and reach out to new leads in the hospitality sector
Schedule and conduct client meetings and product demos
Support in closing deals and onboarding new clients
Maintain CRM with leads, meetings, and follow-ups




Operations & Account Management

Coordinate product installations and client training
Provide field support to clients and resolve operational queries
Track client usage data and report variances or improvement areas
Build and maintain strong client relationships




Requirements:

Based in Bangalore and willing to travel locally for meetings
Own two-wheeler and valid license (mandatory)
Excellent communication and people skills
Good with Google Sheets / Excel
Self-starter who is eager to learn and grow




What You Get:

Real sales experience with premium hospitality brands
Direct mentorship from founders
Certificate & Letter of Recommendation
Opportunity for full-time conversion

title: Engineering Trainee
description:
Role Overview

We are hiring Engineering Trainees to join our engineering teams and work on real

production systems under defined supervision and structured processes. This role is

designed for individuals who want a serious start in software engineering and are

comfortable working with responsibility from an early stage.

This is not an internship or learning-only role.

Key Responsibilities

As an Engineering Trainee, you will be expected to:


Work on assigned development tasks across backend and/or frontend systems
Implement features and fixes strictly as per provided specifications
Follow established coding standards, version control, and review processes
Assist in bug fixing and issue resolution under senior engineer supervision
Participate in testing, validation, and release preparation activities
Write clean, readable, and review-ready code
Maintain basic technical documentation for assigned work
Address code review feedback accurately and within agreed timelines


Expectations & Work Discipline


Strong adherence to engineering processes and instructions
Accuracy, completeness, and ownership of assigned tasks
Clear communication of blockers or uncertainties
Willingness to learn through reviews and feedback
Professional conduct in an onsite, collaborative work environment


Eligibility


Engineering / Computer Science graduate or equivalent
Trained fresher or up to 1 year of experience
Strong fundamentals in programming and software development concepts
Familiarity with Git or version control is preferred

title: Chartered Accountant (Fresher)
description:
We are looking for dynamic CA Freshers to join Ola’s Finance team across multiple verticals such as FP&A, Controllership, Business Finance, and Taxation. The role offers exposure to end-to-end finance operations, business partnering, financial management, and cross-functional collaboration in a fast-paced environment.




Key Responsibilities:

Support budgeting, forecasting, and monthly financial performance analysis.
Conduct variance analysis and assist in preparing management reporting decks.
Perform accounting activities including reconciliations, journal entries, and month-end close tasks.
Assist in audit preparation, documentation, and compliance activities.
Partner with business teams to analyse costs, revenue, profitability, and operational efficiencies.
Support financial modelling, scenario planning, and KPI tracking.
Assist in treasury operations such as cash flow management, banking coordination, and investment documentation.
Conduct process reviews, identify gaps, and support internal audit activities.
Prepare data packs, dashboards, and analysis for leadership decision-making.
Work with cross-functional teams to support strategic and operational finance initiatives.




Key Requirements:

Chartered Accountant (CA) – recently qualified
Strong understanding of financial statements, accounting concepts, and Ind-AS.
Proficiency in MIS reporting, Excel (advanced functions), and large dataset analysis.
Working knowledge of ERP systems and finance tools preferred.
Good communication and stakeholder management skills.
High attention to detail with strong problem-solving ability.
Ability to adapt to a fast-paced environment and take ownership of tasks.

Show more

title: Associate Analyst
description:
Organization: At Comm-Bank, we never lose sight of the role we play in other people’s financial wellbeing. Our focus is to help people and businesses move forward to progress. To make the right financial decisions and achieve their dreams, targets, and aspirations. Regardless of where you work within our organisation, your initiative, talent, ideas, and energy all contribute to the impact that we can make with our work. Together we can achieve great things.

Job Title: Associate Analyst

Location: Bangalore

Business & Team: COO - Retail Operations – Compliance Investigations/Disputes

Impact & contribution: As an Associate Analyst, you will be a self-starter who is passionate about delivering world class customer service, building strong relationships with the stakeholders and you will possess the following attributes:


A Can-do attitude, with the ability to work toward measures that deliver to customer experience and service quality
Demonstrating the ability to grasp concepts in a fast-changing environment.


Reporting lines:

Associate Analyst reports directly to the Manager of the Disputes/Compliance Operations Manager


Applicable to Only Level 3 and above


Roles & Responsibilities: You will be expected to perform the following tasks in a manner consistent with CBA’s Values and People Capabilities.

Core responsibilities:


Analyse disputed card transaction for both fraud and non-fraud transaction by investigating, exploring opportunities to identify recovery and mitigate losses and documenting and resolving claims.


Information and Payment required received from Government agencies/Local court are actioned with due diligence with quality outcome.


Engaging with both internal and external stakeholders to assist with investigation on root cause of losses
Analysing transaction challenges which cause chargeback losses and troubleshooting to determine the issue and working with subject matter experts to identify and execute solution
Work with clients to collect and document information that may be used to resolving outstanding disputes
Ensuring that all the Disputes cases are handled in accordance with the regulatory Requirement.


Essential Skills:


Fresher or 1-3 years’ experience working in a Banking role (preferably Cards/Statutory Compliance processes)
Knowledge on the Disputes resolution/statutory compliance process will be an advantage.
Proven ability to effectively plan and coordinate incoming work and enquiries
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
Excellent Communication and stakeholder management skills, support by collaboration mindset and possess a service-based mindset with strong customer focus.
Proven analytical, and problem-solving skills alongside deriving solutions for customers.
Highly motivated, result driven, team and customer focused
Detail Oriented - Exercise extreme attention to details; is thorough, accurate, organized, and productive and seeks to understand both cause and effect of a situation.
Good Judgement - The exercise of Critical thinking, analysing, assessing and taking ownership of outcome.


Qualifications:


Fresher (Graduate or postgraduate, preferable Commerce/Finance Background)


If you're already part of the Commonwealth Bank Group (including Bankwest, x15ventures), you'll need to apply through Sidekick to submit a valid application. We’re keen to support you with the next step in your career.

We're aware of some accessibility issues on this site, particularly for screen reader users. We want to make finding your dream job as easy as possible, so if you require additional support please contact HR Direct on 1800 989 696.

Advertising End Date: 21/04/2026

title: Fresher- Recruitment Trainee
description:
Position: Fresher- Recruitment Trainee

Locations: Bangalore

Job Type: Full Time

Work Type: Onsite

Shift Timing: Night Shifts

Timing: 6:30 PM to 3:30 AM IST (Monday to Friday)

Transportation: Both Pick and Drop




Overview




TekWissen Group is a workforce management provider throughout India and many other countries in the world.




Job Description:




We are hiring passionate and motivated fresh graduates who are eager to build a career in US IT Recruitment.
As a US IT Recruiter, you will be responsible for sourcing, screening, and submitting potential candidates for various IT positions with our clients in the United States.
You will work closely with Account Managers and delivery leads to understand client requirements and ensure timely and quality submissions.
This is a full-time onsite position designed to train and mold freshers into skilled recruitment professionals in the highly dynamic US staffing industry.

Responsibilities:

Understanding Client Requirements (IT or Non-IT)
Regularly interact with Account Managers and Team Leads to get complete clarity on job requirements.
Understand the technical and functional aspects of each job role (skills, experience level, domain, and location).
Prioritize open requisitions based on urgency and importance.

Candidate Sourcing & Screening:

Use various sourcing channels such as job portals (Dice, Monster, CareerBuilder, etc.), LinkedIn, internal databases, networking, and referrals.
Perform keyword searches and Boolean searches to identify suitable profiles.
Screen candidates through phone/video interviews to evaluate communication skills, technical capabilities, availability, and salary expectations.
Ensure a high level of candidate quality before submission.

Resume Submission & Coordination:

Format and present resumes professionally before sharing with the Account Manager or client.
Maintain a quick turnaround time for candidate submissions to meet tight deadlines.
Follow up regularly with candidates to ensure their availability and interest.
Coordinate interviews between candidates and clients; track feedback and results.

Recruitment Tools & Documentation:

Maintain accurate records of candidate details, job status, and communication history using Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS).
Update internal databases and track candidate progress throughout the recruitment lifecycle.

Required Skills & Qualifications:

Education: Bachelor's degree (Any discipline).
Excellent communication skills is a must (spoken and written English).
Strong interpersonal skills, positive attitude, and willingness to learn.
Ability to multitask, prioritize, and work in a fast-paced environment and Proficient in using MS Office tools.




TekWissen Group is an equal opportunity employer supporting workforce diversity.

title: Freshers and Experienced Security Personnel - Multiple Locations
description:
Job Summary: To ensure the safety and security of passengers, staff, and airport facilities by enforcing aviation security regulations, monitoring restricted areas, and responding to security incidents.

Key Responsibilities


Maintain security standards as per Company requirements,
Ensure effective threat assessment and response capability.
Achieve department goals and follow up.

To maintain files and log sheets.
Give inputs for training requirements.

Team Player

Location: All Operational Stations

Akasa Air does not solicit or accept any form of payment from candidates or institutions during its recruitment process. Any such claims are fraudulent and should be disregarded. title: Walk in Drive For MBA Freshers (Finance) on 15th April-Bangalore
description:
Greeting from Infosys BPM Ltd.,




We are hiring the candidates from MBA Finance Fresher for US Payments Settlement Operations, Chargeback & Merchant Tax Reporting domain for Bangalore location. Please walk-in for interview on 15th April 2026 at Bangalore Location.




Note: Please carry copy of this email to the venue and make sure you register your application before attending the walk-in.




Please use below link to apply and register your application.

https://career.infosys.com/jobdesc?jobReferenceCode=PROGEN-EXTERNAL-240625




Please mention the generated Candidate ID on the top corner of your Resume ***




Interview details:

Interview Date: 15th April 2026

Interview Time: 10:00 AM to 12:30 PM IST ONLY




Interview Venue:

Bangalore, E-City Phase-2, Infosys Limited, No. 40/P-41/P, Gate: 2, Electronic City phase 2, Industrial Area, Konappana Agrahara, Bangalore-560100.

Landmark: In Between Sunik Industries and Tejas Networks.




Please find below Job Details for your reference:

Designation: Senior Process Executive

Job Level: 2A

Experience: Freshers Only- 0 yrs

Shifts: Flexible to work for any shift

Notice Period - Immediate Joiners only

Work Location: Bangalore (Work from Office)

Qualification: MBA in Finance (Full Time)- Year of Passing - 2024 & 2025 only.




Note:

Post Graduation (MBA) and Under Graduation (B.Com/BBA) is a must from (Finance) background.
Candidate should have all original marksheets and PDC of both UG and PG degree will be permitted.
Candidates waiting for final results are not eligible
Pursuing Candidates are not eligible




JOB DESCRIPTION:




1. US Payment Settlement Operations:




Role Summary:

Execute daytoday settlement balancing and routine exception handling across Direct and Indirect portfolios, ensuring accurate funding and timely closure of issues under maker checker controls.




Required Skills:

Strong reconciliation mindset, Excel (vlookups/pivots), basic SQL preferred.
Familiarity with ACH/NACHA, wire funding basics, and card brand settlement cycles.
Clear written/verbal communication; disciplined with SOPs and maker checker protocols.




2. Merchant Tax Reporting:




Overview:

These five JDs cover roles across the US Payment Merchant Taxation process. The scope spans three sub-modules:

(A) State Tax Levy Process intake and processing of IRS/state levy letters, merchant identification, 24-hour holds, collections, cheque requests, and accounting disbursements;

(B) Merchant Tax Reporting liaison with US customers and the IRS for Tax Identification Number (TIN/EIN) accuracy;

(C) Escheatment identification and reporting of unclaimed property to state treasuries as per state laws.




Role Summary:

Execute daily operations across State Tax Levy, Merchant Tax Reporting, and Escheatment with high accuracy and TAT adherence; maintain audit-ready documentation and follow maker checker controls.




Key Responsibilities:

Open/log levy/IRS letters; identify merchant; check activity status; place 24-hour holds for active merchants.
Calculate and initiate collections; raise cheque requests; coordinate with Accounting for disbursements.
For inactive merchants, prepare and dispatch appropriate responses as per SOPs.
Validate TIN/EIN against internal/IRS records; liaise with clients for corrections; update systems (Merchant Tax Reporting).
Identify dormant/unclaimed assets; validate eligibility; prepare due diligence outreach; support state-wise reporting and remittance (Escheatment).
Maintain evidence packs and audit trails; ensure data privacy and document retention standards.
Meet daily SLA targets on productivity, TAT, and quality.




3. Chargeback & Dispute Management:




Role Summary:

Own end-to-end merchant dispute handling across Visa, Mastercard, American Express, and Discover, including chargeback, representment, pre-arbitration, and arbitration. Maximize recovery, ensure rule compliance, and deliver a strong merchant experience under network SLAs.




Required Qualifications:

Merchant disputes & chargebacks across Visa, Mastercard, Amex, Discover.
Practical exposure to VCR/MDR workflows and phases (chargeback representment pre-arb arbitration).
Experience drafting reason-code-specific narratives and assembling CE.
Hands-on with VROL, Mastercom/Claims Manager, Amex/Discover portals; CRM/ticketing tools.
Strong analytical and written skills; ability to interpret payment data/logs to build a defensible case.
High ownership, urgency, and resilience under tight deadlines; willingness to work US hours onsite (no hybrid/remote).




Documents to Carry:

Carry a printout your updated resume.
Carry any 2 photo Identity proof (PAN Card/Driving License/Voters ID card/Passport).
All original education documents needs to be available for verification. (10th, 12th, Graduation (Sem Wise Marksheet, CMM. Provisional and Original Degree).




Mandatory to Carry:

Smartphone with good front camera, charger and Headset for Assessment, Government ID proof Hardcopy.




Pointers to note:

Please do not carry laptops/cameras to the venue as these will not be allowed due to security restrictions.
Original Government ID card is must for Security Clearance




Regards,

Infosys BPM Recruitment team

title: Technical Solution Research Intern
description:
Technical Solution Research


Position: Intern (Fresher)


Department: Solutions



Role Overview




We are seeking a highly motivated fresher with a strong interest in technology and a willingness to learn. The Technical Solution Research Intern will support the Solutions team with technology research, solution structuring, documentation, presentation preparation, and competitive analysis. This role is ideal for candidates looking to develop foundational skills in solution design, pre-sales support, and technical evaluation.









Key Responsibilities




Conduct research on products, technologies, solutions, and industry trends.


Assist in developing solution designs, architecture diagrams, and technical proposals.


Prepare comparison sheets, technical documentation, and structured reports.


Create and support paper presentations and technical presentations for internal and client use.


Support the pre-sales and solutions teams with data gathering and analysis.


Maintain research notes, product catalogs, and internal knowledge base content.


Assist in preparing technical documentation, case studies, and knowledge-sharing materials.


Participate in discussions for solution improvement and research innovation.









Skills Required




Basic understanding of hardware, networking, cloud technologies, or software systems.


Strong analytical, research, and documentation abilities.


Good presentation and communication skills.


Ability to create structured documents, reports, and presentations.


Auto CAD 2D or 3D Designing.

Proficiency in MS Office and online research tools.


Willingness to learn new technologies and adapt quickly.









Eligibility Criteria




Freshers with Mechanical, Electronics, Electrical, or related engineering backgrounds.


BE / B.Tech graduates or final-year students are eligible to apply.


Candidates with interest or exposure to research, documentation, and technical presentations will be preferred.


Show more

title: Intern for LHC - India Ecosystem R&D
description:
About this Position Henkel is looking for a motivated fresher to join Bioscience team, Future tech HCB R&D, Laundry and Home Care as an intern. This role offers hands-on exposure to laundry and home care innovation projects, from lab-based formulation and testing to evaluation of external innovation concepts delivering to global Henkel consumer business portfolio.

Internship Tenure: 12 months

What You´ll Do


Conduct literature review and maintain digital documentation
Plan and execute bench-scale experiments, including formulation preparation, testing, and data capture
Support evaluation of external innovation concepts and partner-led projects
Prepare presentations and concise technical documentation


What makes you a good fit


BE in Chemical Engineering, Material Science, Biochemical Engineering or MSc in Biochemistry, Biotechnology, Chemistry, or Industrial Chemistry
Working knowledge of MS Office, power point and Excel; familiarity with relevant AI tools is an advantage


Some perks of joining Henkel


Diverse national and international growth opportunities
Global wellbeing standards with health and preventive care programs
Gender-neutral parental leave for a minimum of 8 weeks
Employee Share Plan with voluntary investment and Henkel matching shares
Best-in-class Group Medical Insurance policy covering employee, spouse and up to 2 children
Competitive accident and term life policies for up to 3 times annual gross salary
Progressive OPD policy of INR 30,000 for employee, spouse and up to 2 children


At Henkel, we come from a broad range of backgrounds, perspectives, and life experiences. We believe the uniqueness of all our employees is the power in us. Become part of the team and bring your uniqueness to us! We look for a diverse team of individuals who possess different backgrounds, experiences, personalities and mindsets.

title: Inside Sales Representative (Fresher) – Quantum & AI Education
description:
About QpiAI:

At QpiAI, we are not an ed-tech company but a deep-tech organization building cutting-edge products in Quantum Computing and Artificial Intelligence.

Our education platform, QpiAI Explorer, enables learners to upskill in the most advanced technologies of the decade.




About the Role:

We are currently looking for an Inside Sales Representative (Fresher) who is eager to start their career in sales and contribute to driving growth across students, working professionals, and individual learners.




What You’ll Do:

Handle and qualify inbound leads through calls, emails, and virtual meetings
Engage with prospective learners and understand their learning needs
Communicate the value of programs related to AI and Quantum Computing
Convert prospects through value-driven discussions.
Collaborate with technical experts from the Quantum and AI domain.
Track sales metrics and contribute to strategy development.
Maintain and update lead data using CRM tools
Collaborate with internal teams to ensure smooth onboarding experience
Track interactions and contribute to daily sales activities




What We’re Looking For:

Freshers or candidates with up to 0–6 months of experience
Strong interest in sales, communication, and customer interaction
Good verbal and written communication skills
Basic understanding or curiosity towards AI, Quantum technology & emerging domains
Willingness to learn, adapt, and work in a target-driven environment
Comfortable using basic tools such as Excel, CRM platforms, or communication tools




Why Join QpiAI?

Work in a high-growth Quantum + AI ecosystem
Opportunity to build a career in B2C tech sales
Exposure to cutting-edge technologies and real-time industry use cases
Fast-paced, learning-driven environment

title: Walk-in || Fresher Hiring For Airport Ground Staff
description:
Job Description: Airstriprealtech is seeking enthusiastic and motivated individuals to join our team as Airport Ground Staff. As a member of our ground staff team, you will be responsible for ensuring the safety and comfort of our passengers while they are on the ground. This is a great opportunity for freshers to kickstart their career in the aviation industry. Key Responsibilities: 1. Greet and assist passengers with check-in, baggage, and boarding procedures. 2. Ensure the safety and security of passengers and their belongings. 3. Provide excellent customer service to passengers by addressing their inquiries and concerns. 4. Handle and resolve any customer complaints or issues in a professional manner. 5. Assist in the boarding process and ensure all passengers are seated and ready for takeoff. 6. Communicate effectively with other ground staff, flight crew, and airport personnel. 7. Ensure the timely and efficient flow of passengers through the airport. 8. Monitor flight schedules and make necessary announcements. 9. Follow all safety and security procedures as per company policies and regulations. 10. Maintain a clean and organized work environment. Requirements: 1. Minimum qualification of 10+2 or equivalent. 2. Excellent communication and interpersonal skills. 3. Ability to work in a fast-paced and dynamic environment. 4. Customer service-oriented with a positive attitude. 5. Basic computer skills. 6. Willingness to work in shifts, including nights and weekends. 7. Must be physically fit and able to lift heavy baggage. 8. Prior experience in the aviation industry is a plus, but not required. We offer a competitive salary package and benefits, along with opportunities for growth and development within the company. If you have a passion for the aviation industry and a desire to provide exceptional customer service, then we want to hear from you! Apply now to join our team as an Airport Ground Staff.

description:

Assist senior doctors in patient consultations and ayurvedic treatments

title: Human Resources Intern
description:
Job Title: HR INTERN

About Us

“Capco, a Wipro company, is a global technology and management consulting firm. Awarded with Consultancy of the year in the British Bank Award and has been ranked Top 100 Best Companies for Women in India 2022 by Avtar & Seramount. With our presence across 32 cities across globe, we support 100+ clients across banking, financial and Energy sectors. We are recognized for our deep transformation execution and delivery.

WHY JOIN CAPCO?

You will work on engaging projects with the largest international and local banks, insurance companies, payment service providers and other key players in the industry. The projects that will transform the financial services industry.

MAKE AN IMPACT

Innovative thinking, delivery excellence and thought leadership to help our clients transform their business. Together with our clients and industry partners, we deliver disruptive work that is changing energy and financial services.

#BEYOURSELFATWORK

Capco has a tolerant, open culture that values diversity, inclusivity, and creativity.

CAREER ADVANCEMENT

With no forced hierarchy at Capco, everyone has the opportunity to grow as we grow, taking their career into their own hands.

DIVERSITY & INCLUSION

We believe that diversity of people and perspective gives us a competitive advantage.




We’re Hiring: HR Intern (Full-Time | Contract to Hire)

Are you a recent MBA (HR) graduate looking to kick-start your HR career with hands-on exposure to HR operations, documentation, and process excellence in a global environment? This opportunity is for you!

🔍 Role Overview

We are hiring one HR Intern to support our HR team in clean-up and validation of Employee Personnel Files (P-Files) across APAC regions ahead of an SAP migration, and to assist in revising, updating, and publishing HR Process SOPs.

This role is ideal for a detail-oriented fresher who enjoys working with documents, process improvements, and structured data.

📍 Location & Work Model

Location: EC, Bengaluru
Work Model: Hybrid – Office on Tuesday & Wednesday
Shift: 7:00 AM – 4:00 PM IST
Weekly Off: Saturday & Sunday

⏳ Contract Details

Type: Intern (Full-Time)
Duration: 3 Months (Contract-to-Hire opportunity)
Notice Period: Immediate

✅ Key Responsibilities

Clean, organize, and validate Employee Personnel Files (P-Files) for APAC employees
Ensure documents meet compliance and audit standards
Assist in reviewing, updating, and formatting HR Process SOPs
Support SOP version control and publishing
Coordinate with the Hiring Manager/Coach for documentation accuracy
Maintain strict confidentiality of employee data

🎓 Eligibility & Skills

MBA / PGDM in HR (Fresher preferred | 0–6 months experience)
Strong MS Office skills (Excel, Word, PowerPoint)
Excellent written and verbal communication
High attention to detail and process orientation
Willingness to work on documentation-heavy tasks




If you are keen to join us, you will be part of an organization that values your contributions, recognizes your potential, and provides ample opportunities for growth. For more information, visit www.capco.com. Follow us on Twitter, Facebook, LinkedIn, and YouTube.

Show more

title: MBA fresher / MBA graduate [ONLY FRESHER]
description:
JOB DESCRIPTION: MBA graduate ONLY FRESHER




We are looking for highly motivated and talented MBA graduates (final year students or recent graduates) who demonstrate strong analytical thinking, communication skills, and a passion for solving business challenges.




This role is designed for individuals who are eager to learn, adaptable, and capable of working in a dynamic professional environment. The selected candidates will gain exposure to core business functions, collaborate with cross-functional teams, and contribute to strategic initiatives that drive organizational growth.




Key qualities:

Support business teams in research, analysis, and execution of strategic initiatives
Analyze data, prepare reports, and present insights to stakeholders
Assist in planning, coordination, and implementation of projects
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to improve processes and efficiency
Participate in problem-solving and decision-making activities
Conduct market and competitor research to support business strategies




Eligibility criteria:

MBA (or equivalent postgraduate management degree) – final year students or recent graduates
Strong academic record with consistent performance
Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities
Ability to adapt quickly in a fast-paced environment
Positive attitude, curiosity, and eagerness to learn
Proficiency in MS Office (Excel, PowerPoint, Word)

title: HR Intern – Bhiwandi
description:
Job Title

HR Intern – Bhiwandi

Location

Bhiwandi

Experience

Fresher

Roles and responsibilities

Key Responsibilities


Managing complete Recruitment Life Cycle including Manpower planning, resourcing both internal & external manpower, identifying the possible sources, selecting the best candidate and negotiating & fitting them at right place at right time.
Aligned with business to understand the business needs in terms of HR supports, manpower requirement, making organization structure defining job descriptions for all unique
Managing HR Operations and employee relations across manufacturing
Supporting through key people topics like manpower budgeting, performance management, internal job opportunities.
Employees connect and employee
Managing employee communication and rewards &
Supporting the business in having critical employee conversations; providing feedback for improvement, employee retention and so on.


About ID Fresh Food

iD was founded in 2005, to ensure that people around the world gets access to fresh, nutritious & delicious Indian food. With an unwavering vision to preserve traditional, home-made cuisine & a focus on making the process of cooking fun & effortless, iD today serves homes across India, Middle East, US and UK and soon to make entry into high-potential markets such as North America, Europe, Africa, Central & East Asia. At iD, we’re not just about food—we’re about nourishing lives and fostering a culture where every individual thrives.

Guided by our DNA, “Pure Food. Proud Lives,” we believe in offering an environment where employees are empowered to solve novel challenges every day, and every voice and opinion is valued. We are committed to building meaningful careers and place the highest priority on the well-being of our team.

Job specifications

Key Qualifications


Education: Any Graduate, MBA is preferable
Experience: Fresher.
Languages: English and Hindi.

company: SEOWebPlanet Solutions - Digital Marketing Company in India
description:

We are a full-service digital marketing company in Vadodara. We have been helping our clients to attain their business objectives by identifying their audiences, creating the right content, making a mark on social media and a lot more. Our job is to amplify your business presence online.

Performing activities related to #SEO (On-Page & Off Page) on a continuous basis.
Monitoring social media platforms & Manage Email Marketing campaigns.

Using and researching the internet and new media to reach new customers, generate leads
Creating promotional presentations

Fluency in Language (Verbal/Written in English)


Job Type: Full Time

Location: Vadodara

title: Sales Associate & Intern
description:
Location: Bengaluru (Indiranagar)

Reporting to: Sales Manager

Full Time: Fresher to 2 years

Internship: at least 3 months mandatory




About Lane

At Lane, we’re reimagining how India learns driving and experiences car ownership. From structured driving programs to car buying & selling within our trusted community, we’re building a tech-enabled mobility ecosystem for first-time drivers. With 15,000+ registrations and strong early traction, we’re scaling fast — and sales sits at the heart of our growth journey.




Role Overview

As a Sales Associate & Intern, you will drive revenue by converting high-intent leads into paying customers. You’ll work closely with marketing, operations, and customer success teams to ensure a seamless experience from first interaction to onboarding. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys speaking with customers, understands consultative selling, and wants to grow in a fast-paced startup environment.




Key Responsibilities

Convert inbound leads into customers via calls and WhatsApp
Understand customer requirements and recommend the right driving package
Manage follow-ups and maintain strong pipeline hygiene
Track daily conversions and revenue targets
Coordinate with operations for smooth onboarding
Maintain CRM data accuracy
Identify customer objections and improve pitch quality
Upsell relevant services (RTO assistance, car buying support, etc.)




What We’re Looking For

Fresher to 2 years of experience in inside sales / telesales / EdTech / mobility / service sales
Strong communication skills (English + Hindi preferred; Kannada is a bonus)
High ownership mindset
Comfortable working with targets and performance metrics
Basic understanding of Google Sheets / CRM tools
Ability to handle objections confidently
Startup attitude — adaptable, fast learner, action-oriented




What You’ll Gain

Direct exposure to startup growth and revenue strategy
Clear performance metrics & learning curve
Opportunity to grow into senior sales / city lead roles
High ownership from Day 1
Work closely with founders




Why Join Lane?

Because we’re not just selling driving lessons — we’re building confidence, independence, and a trusted car ownership ecosystem for India’s next generation of drivers. If you’re excited about mobility, growth, and building something meaningful — we’d love to meet you.

Show more

title: Fresher Arabic language Medical Tourism
description:
About Fitsib

Fitsib is a critical-care guidance and treatment navigation platform helping patients and families make the right medical decision and coordinate treatment smoothly—from specialist consultations to travel, stay, and post-treatment recovery support. We work with patients across multiple countries and focus on high-trust, high-urgency healthcare journeys.




Job Location

Gurgaon (Sector 32) – Work from Office (On-site only)




Language Requirement (Mandatory)

You must be fluent in English + Arabic

(English is mandatory for all candidates.)




Role Overview

As an International Patient Medical Counsellor, you will handle international patient leads, understand their medical condition, guide them toward suitable treatment options, and coordinate the end-to-end journey until hospital admission and treatment initiation. This is a target-driven, high-impact role working closely with hospital teams and internal operations.




Key Responsibilities

Connect with international patient leads (WhatsApp/calls) and build trust
Understand the patient’s condition, reports, and requirements
Share suitable doctor/hospital treatment options aligned with the patient’s case
Understand budget constraints and guide families toward feasible treatment pathways
Schedule doctor consultations and support the patient/family in decision-making
Coordinate with internal teams for:
Visa invitation letter process
Visa application support (patient + attendant)
Hotel options within budget
Arrival coordination based on flight details
Airport pickup arrangements
Ensure smooth hospital admission and that treatment proceeds as planned
Maintain accurate lead updates and communication logs in Zoho CRM
Achieve monthly follow-up, consultation, and conversion targets




Education Qualification

Graduate degree in any discipline
Strong computer skills (mandatory)
Fluency requirement as mentioned above (mandatory)




Requirements

Experience in international patient handling / healthcare / medical facilitation / medical travel (preferred)
Strong communication and counselling skills (must be empathetic + confident)
Comfortable with a performance-based, target-driven environment
Strong follow-up discipline and ability to manage multiple leads simultaneously
Ability to coordinate across teams and handle time-sensitive patient situations
Strategic mindset to build long-term patient trust, not just quick closures




Benefits

Competitive fixed salary (based on experience)
Monthly incentives based on performance and conversions
High-growth role in a mission-driven healthcare startup
Opportunity to work with international patients across multiple countries




How to Apply

📩 Email your resume to: anshul@fitsib.com

📲 Or WhatsApp: +91 88604 11356

title: Digital Marketing Intern
description:

·      Perform basic SEO activities (approx. 1 hour daily) — keyword research, on-page updates, blog optimization, and tracking

·      Monitor and report performance metrics such as engagement, reach, and website traffic




Required Experience

·      Strong interest in digital marketing and willingness to learn

Interest in financial markets is a plus




Must-Have Skills / Tools

·      SMM (Social Media Marketing)

·      Content creation for social media (reels, stories, posts)

·      Canva or similar design tools




Languages Required

Proficiency in any two: Bengali / English / Hindi




Education: Pursuing Graduation / Graduate (any discipline)




Key Competencies

·      Creativity and curiosity

·      Learning mindset and willingness to upskill

·      Consistency in execution

·      Organized and process-oriented approach




Compensation: INR 1-1.2 lacs per annum




Immediate joiners preferred

title: Human Resources Intern
description:
Job Title: HR Intern

Company: 1XL

Job Type: Full-time

Stipend: 15,000 for 3 month, one time payment post Internship

Experience: Fresher

Job Mode: Work From Office

Location: Ahmedabad




About Us

1XL is a Dubai-based, dynamic, and versatile company that encompasses various aspects of personal and professional growth. With a commitment to empowering individuals and organizations, 1XL aims to inspire, educate, and equip people with the tools they need to succeed in various domains of life.




Role Overview

We are looking for a proactive and enthusiastic HR Intern to support our Human Resources team in daily operations. This role offers hands-on experience in recruitment, employee engagement, and HR processes. The ideal candidate will be eager to learn, highly organized, and passionate about building a career in Human Resources.

Key Responsibilities

1. Recruitment & Hiring Support

Assist in sourcing candidates through job portals and social media
Screen resumes and shortlist candidates
Coordinate interview schedules and follow-ups
Maintain candidate database and recruitment trackers

2. Employee Engagement

Support in organizing employee engagement activities
Assist in internal communication initiatives
Help in maintaining a positive workplace culture

3. HR Operations

Maintain employee records and documentation
Assist in onboarding and offboarding processes
Support in preparing HR reports and trackers

4. Administrative Support

Handle day-to-day HR administrative tasks
Maintain files, records, and HR databases
Assist the HR team in daily operations
Requirements
Bachelor’s degree in HR, Business Administration, or related field (or pursuing)
Strong communication and interpersonal skills
Basic knowledge of HR functions
Good organizational and multitasking abilities
Proficiency in MS Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint)
What You Will Gain
Hands-on experience in core HR functions
Exposure to recruitment and HR operations
Opportunity to work in a dynamic and growing organization
Skill development in communication and people management
Note

This is a 3-month internship with a one-time stipend payout upon successful completion of the internship.

title: Sales And Marketing Intern
description:
We’re Hiring Sales & Marketing Interns (Fintech | Hybrid Work Model) 🚀

Are you a driven BBA/MBA fresher passionate about fintech, sales, and client engagement? At haeywa, we’re building the future of petty cash and business payments, and we’re looking for interns who are eager to learn and contribute to our growth journey.

Location: Gurgaon (Hybrid model)

Internship includes a stipend of 5k/month , certificate, and potential PPO for high performers.

Duration: 3- 6 Months




About haeywa

“ haeywa “ is the future of petty cash management in India! It offers fully digitized ,smart expense management solutions for corporates simplifying the spend management processes . We are revolutionizing the way in which organizations can manage their finances bringing transparency to the system, saving time, preventing huge revenue leakages as well as creating an immersive experience for the employees. We are the first company in India who has made payments and reconciliation possible in real time.




Role Overview

We are seeking driven BBA and MBA freshers passionate about fintech and eager to gain practical experience in business growth and partnerships. As a Sales & Marketing networking intern at haeywa, you will play a crucial role in acquiring new clients for our cutting-edge fintech solutions. This is an exciting opportunity for individuals looking to break into the fintech space and contribute to the growth of a dynamic startup.




Key Responsibilities

Research and identify potential clients in need of solutions for their petty cash and business payments.

Generate leads using Apollo, Lusha, LinkedIn Sales Navigator, and other digital prospecting tools.

Reach out to prospects via cold calls, emails, and digital channels to introduce haeywa's offerings.

Understand client needs and pitch our product features as solutions for their business challenges.

Collaborate with the haeywa team to develop tailored sales strategies.

Achieve defined targets by successfully bringing new clients on board.

What We’re Looking For

Fresh BBA/MBA graduates or final-year students interested in fintech and business development.

Excellent communication and relationship-building skills.

Passion for sales, lead generation, and client engagement.

Familiarity or willingness to learn lead-gen tools like Apollo, Lusha, and LinkedIn Sales Navigator.

Self-motivated, proactive, and results-driven.

Comfortable working in a hybrid set up.

How to apply: If you are eager to learn and grow in fintech space this internship is for you. Send your resume to hr@dotnova.ai. For more information, visit us at https://haeywa.ai/ . Please feel free to share this with anyone who might be interested in this internship opportunity.
